events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need analyze scenario: residential electrical, receptacles & switches, rough-complete, observed field condition: reversed polarity. Need determine compliance. Reversed polarity on receptacles means hot and neutral reversed. NEC requires correct polarity. Receptacles must be wired per 406.4? Actually 406.4 covers receptacle rating/type, tamper-resistant, etc. Reversed polarity violates NEC 110.3(B) installation and use per listing, and 200.10? Polarity identification. Also 406.9 covers receptacles in wet/damp locations. Reversed polarity is a shock hazard, high risk. Decision fail. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80? Value not relevant. Sound source etc default empty string/0. Need valid JSON. Need include references NEC 110.3(B), 200.10? But reference material only lists 210.8, 406.4, 406.9. We can rely on those plus general. Reversed polarity fails. Need actions: turn off circuit, identify and correct wiring, verify polarity with tester, re-inspect. Findings: reversed polarity at receptacle/switch, energized neutral, shock/fire hazard. Let's craft JSON. Ensure no prose outside JSON.
